meta.title: Self-Awareness Pattern Test - Discover Your Hidden Pattern | DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover your hidden behavioral pattern with this insightful personality quiz! 8 relatable scenarios reveal your unique communication and relationship style from 6 types.

intro.hook: Everyone has one blind spot they can't see. Do you know yours?
intro.title: What's Your Hidden Pattern?
intro.desc: Understanding yourself is the first step to growth. 8 everyday scenarios reveal your unique behavioral pattern.
intro.value: Self-awareness leads to better relationships and personal growth.
intro.disclaimer: This test is for fun and self-reflection only. Not a clinical assessment.

types.ghosterDesc: Disappears when things get real. Avoids confrontation at all costs.
types.overPromiserDesc: Says yes to everything, delivers on half. Good intentions, questionable follow-through.
types.passiveAggressorDesc: "I'm fine" = definitely not fine. Master of the loaded sigh.
types.mainCharacterDesc: Every situation somehow becomes about you. You didn't mean to steal the spotlight... or did you?
types.serialCancelerDesc: Makes plans enthusiastically, then finds the perfect excuse to cancel. Your couch is your soulmate.
types.chronicComparerDesc: Measures success against everyone else's highlight reel. Instagram is your frenemy.

question.0: Your friend texts "we need to talk." What do you do?
question.1: Someone takes credit for your idea at work.
question.2: You made plans with friends but your couch looks really comfy right now.
question.3: Your friend posts amazing vacation photos while you're stuck at work.
question.4: You said you'd help a friend move this weekend.
question.5: Someone asks you "are you mad at me?"
question.6: Your friend just got a big promotion.
question.7: You're running 20 minutes late to meet someone.

option.0a: Read it, panic, and don't reply for 3 days
option.0b: Immediately start planning your apology speech for something you may or may not have done
option.0c: Reply "sure, what's up?" then spend 4 hours analyzing every possible meaning
option.0d: Text back "lol same" without reading the full message
option.1a: Say nothing but passive-aggressively CC your original email to everyone
option.1b: Confront them... in your head. In real life, you smile and die inside
option.1c: Start telling the story of how YOU came up with it, making it about your genius
option.1d: Immediately compare yourself to them and wonder if you're even good at your job
option.2a: Cancel with a creative excuse you've been perfecting all day
option.2b: Go but complain the entire time about how tired you are
option.2c: Post a story of your couch saying "sometimes self-care wins" and ghost the group chat
option.2d: Go, then tell everyone at the hangout about that time YOU almost stayed home
option.3a: Like the photo while internally calculating how their life compares to yours
option.3b: Start planning your own vacation immediately to one-up them
option.3c: Send a supportive comment, then vent to someone else about how unfair life is
option.3d: Mute their stories for your own mental health and pretend you never saw it
option.4a: "Help" by showing up late with coffee and mostly supervising
option.4b: Cancel the morning of with a suspiciously specific excuse
option.4c: Go but spend the whole time talking about YOUR last move and how much harder it was
option.4d: Say yes to helping but also promise three other people different things that same day
option.5b: Ghost them for a day to "process your feelings"
option.5c: Launch into a 20-minute monologue about YOUR feelings and how YOU were affected
option.5d: Say no but immediately check their Instagram to see if they're having more fun than you
option.6a: Congratulate them while secretly calculating how far behind you are
option.6b: Make the conversation about YOUR career struggles and upcoming plans
option.6c: Promise to take them out to celebrate, then keep rescheduling
option.6d: Send a congratulations text, then leave them on read for the next week
option.7a: Send "almost there!" when you haven't left your house yet
option.7b: Arrive late and immediately make the situation about how crazy YOUR day has been
option.7c: Ghost their "where are you?" texts and show up acting like nothing happened
option.7d: Mentally compare your punctuality to everyone else's and decide you're still better

result.title: Your Pattern Is...
result.desc: Don't worry, we all have one. The first step is awareness!
result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of people share your exact pattern profile

tips.ghoster: Next time you feel like disappearing, try sending even a short reply. "I need some time" is better than silence.
tips.overPromiser: Before saying yes, pause for 5 seconds. Check your calendar. It's okay to say "let me think about it."
tips.passiveAggressor: Practice naming your feelings directly. "I felt hurt when..." is more honest than "I'm fine."
tips.mainCharacter: Try the 2:1 rule — ask 2 questions about others before sharing 1 thing about yourself.
tips.serialCanceler: Only commit to plans you'd be excited about RIGHT NOW. Quality > quantity of social commitments.
tips.chronicComparer: Unfollow accounts that trigger comparison. Remember: you're comparing your behind-the-scenes to their highlight reel.
tips.general: Self-awareness is the first step to growth. The fact that you took this test shows emotional maturity.

share.twitterText: My behavioral pattern is: {type}! What's yours? Find out:
